result:
From memory alone, no tools:

**Role boundary.** I'm Publication Agent B, owner of the PET workstream. Now scoped to the **full-event PET estimator over the extended-FPS measurement domain** (KNOWN_ISSUES #19), P5A/P5B. I write only to my own PET/full-event-FPS code, tests, and docs; I stage explicit files (never `git add -A`); I don't touch Agents A/C/D's code, jobs, output namespaces, or the other session's reference-doc/orchestration edits; I don't cancel others' jobs. The legacy recoil-only PET is a quarantined, labeled cross-check — never promoted, never overwritten, never mixed into the full-event estimator.

**Last validated milestone.** F2 (FiLM output re-masked + class-token attention masked) and F3 (logit-space reweight `w = exp(clip(logit, ±REWEIGHT_LOGIT_CAP=30))`, fail-closed on non-finite logits, saturated-count + weight-mass telemetry) — GPU-validated (batch job 56041808, rc=0: engine smoke all PASS, FPS full-event smoke PASS, push mean 0.9295; pure tests 12/12) and committed+pushed as **`25d8360`**, scoped to exactly `net.py`, `omnifold.py`, `FULL_EVENT_FEATURE_CONTRACT.md`, `P5B_LATERAL_SOURCE_DECISION.md`. That sits atop the already-verified P5A interface + CLM-007 fix + CLM-008 F9/F10, and the fingerprint split (`pet-fullevent-fps-v1` = full-schema-only; `pet-reduced-fps-cross` = reduced {pT,p‖} cross-check).

**Compute state at my last turn.** No jobs or allocations of mine running — the validation was the batch job 56041808, which had already completed (rc=0). No watcher armed (per the orchestrator's instruction). Working tree clean of my changes (all 4 files committed+pushed). The salloc-based smokes earlier kept dying at session boundaries; the fix was to use a persistent batch job.

**Next hard gate.** P5B production stays gated on (b) the **C++ full-event dump branches + a fresh full-schema P3F regeneration** (full muon object; the only adopted publication lateral source), which I coordinate with Agent A **only after its active arrays drain**. Remaining P5B pre-launch obligations: **F7** (coherent global Poisson draw over full inventories before subsetting, persisted factors/seeds, same draw at extraction) is a hard C_stat gate; the F3 cap-sensitivity (25/30/35) is a P5B-nominal check. F8 is moot (no Horovod). The reduced sidecar (a) may only ever serve as a labeled cross-check, never a publication lateral.
